summary: Comprehensive testing of EV Charging CMS application with authentication system. Tested backend APIs (90.9% success rate) and frontend integration (100% success rate). All core authentication flows, protected routes, responsive design, and navigation functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 520 status code instead of 401 for invalid token
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - authentication still works correctly, just unexpected status code

info_notes.issue: Shows admin@cms.com / admin123 but password was changed during testing to NewTestPass123!
info_notes.impact: Users may be confused by outdated displayed credentials
info_notes.note: This is expected since backend tests changed the password

passed_tests: Backend API connection and health check
User registration and duplicate email validation
Password reset flow (forgot password + reset password)
User dropdown menu and profile display
Mobile responsive design and mobile sidebar
success_percentage: Backend: 90.9% (10/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all major flows working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider updating the displayed default credentials on login page to reflect current admin password, or reset admin password back to admin123 for consistency. The invalid token response status code could be improved but is not critical.
